title: Notifications -  Update successful OFF
scenario: Device Software Update notification appears despite being turned OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts after background firmware update completes
steps: Go to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts
Set 'Device Software Update' notifications to OFF
Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device
Ensure a firmware update is available for the connected device
While the update is in progress, send the app to the background (e.g., press Home or switch to another app)
Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully
Observe whether any notification appears on the device
expected: No notification is displayed upon successful firmware update completion when the app is in the background and Device Software Update notifications are turned OFF.
